description: Update infrastructure routing to support a split between static marketing/legal content, the Vite patient app, and API Gateway. Scope: decide same-domain paths versus app subdomain for staging/production; route /api/* to API Gateway with caching disabled; route patient app paths to the Vite static artifact with SPA fallback; keep marketing/legal pages static and SEO-friendly; ensure CloudFront functions/error responses do not break deep links; preserve allowed origins for Lambda CORS/session behavior. Acceptance criteria: CDK diff shows explicit origins/behaviors for API and patient app; deep links such as /intake, /onboarding/mdi, /dashboard work after refresh; /api/* never falls back to static HTML; staging smoke tests validate representative routes.
title: Update CDK CloudFront routing for marketing site, patient app, and API origins
